series_metadata.series_description: These forms are required to be certified to the Department of Taxation following the official vote county by all boards of elections. The information contained pertains to voted tax levies and bond issues and is necessary in checking the rates of taxation filed on Form DTE27. See Sec. 5705.26 and 133.14, R.C. of Ohio.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: documents life of levy or its renewal, and ; Electronic: documents life of levy or its renewal, and
